summary: Full audit of Anima Fund autonomous AI VC platform - LIVE agent running on Conway Cloud. Tested all 3 screens (Genesis, Engine, Dashboard), 13 dashboard pages, and 29 API endpoints. Backend: 24/29 passed (83%), 5 transient timeout failures on first requests. Frontend: all navigation and pages working.

minor.issue: First 5 tests timed out due to connection warm-up, subsequent tests passed

integration_issues.issue: Auto-redirects to Engine view when allProvDone=true - this is expected behavior by design

issues: React key prop warning in FundHQ component - minor, non-blocking
404 errors for skill/tool icons - missing static assets, non-blocking

action_items: FundHQ component: Add unique key props to list items to fix React warning
Skills page: Host skill icon images or add fallback to prevent 404 errors
critical_code_review_comments: Genesis screen auto-transitions to Engine when provisioning complete (allProvDone) - working as designed
Webhook daemon pushing data correctly, engine_running=true
SSE stream working for real-time updates
All 13 dashboard pages navigable and functional
Agent dropdown with Create New Agent working
Live agent running GPT-5.2 inference with ~$2.20 Conway credits

success_rate.backend: 83% (24/29 tests passed, 5 timeout failures on cold start)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (all navigation, pages, and core features working)

seed_data_creation: None - using live Conway sandbox with running agent
context_for_next_testing_agent: Live agent on Conway sandbox 47ba9dfd569c96df2663004bd8b73b86 running GPT-5.2. All 3 screens (Genesis, Engine, Dashboard) work. Wallet: 0x922868f5299b584177256F22DDd753D42117E3eD. Credits: ~$2.20. Genesis auto-redirects to Engine when provisioning complete. Fly.io tests will fail (trial ended). All 29 API endpoints tested.
